targets.description: High protein vegetarian meals using your requested staples. Adjust portions slightly based on hunger.

meals.title: Breakfast
items: Oats (40g) cooked with water or skim milk
1 scoop whey protein (or 100g greek yogurt mixed in)
3 whole eggs on the side (boiled or scrambled)

meals.title: Lunch
items: 150g Low-fat Paneer or Soya Chunks (added to Sabzi)
2 Roti (skip rice here to save calories)

meals.title: Pre/Post Workout Snack
items: 1 scoop protein powder (if needed to hit macro goals)
